title: HungerBed
description: The datapack takes away saturation points during sleep.
body:
Welcome to the world of "Hungry Bed,"
a datapack that introduces a new level of realism to your Minecraft gameplay!
Sleeping is no longer just a way to skip the night – now you'll also need to pay attention to your hunger.
Every hour spent sleeping will gradually decrease your saturation level,
forcing you to prepare accordingly before going to bed.
